descriptions.diplomatic_visit: Formal diplomatic meeting to improve relations
descriptions.trade_negotiation: Seek economic partnerships and alternative trade routes
descriptions.cultural_exchange: Soft power initiatives to build people-to-people ties
descriptions.humanitarian_aid: Provide humanitarian assistance to affected populations
descriptions.mediation_offer: Third-party offer to broker peace between warring parties
descriptions.coalition_building: Build alliances and partnerships with other states
descriptions.backchannel_negotiations: Secret diplomatic dialogue outside official channels
descriptions.formal_peace_talks: High-level structured negotiations with framework agreements
descriptions.prisoner_exchange: Exchange captured personnel as humanitarian gesture
descriptions.humanitarian_corridors: Establish safe passage for civilians in conflict zones
descriptions.public_diplomatic_initiative: Public diplomacy campaign to shape international narrative
descriptions.formal_multilateral_engagement: Engage through international institutions for legitimacy
descriptions.international_observers: Deploy international monitors to conflict area
descriptions.intelligence_gathering: Collect information on adversary capabilities and intentions
descriptions.spread_disinformation: Spread false narratives to confuse adversary
descriptions.propaganda_campaign: Information campaigns to shape domestic and international opinion
descriptions.share_intelligence: Provide intel to allies to coordinate strategy
descriptions.information_campaign: Broader information warfare to influence target audiences
descriptions.trade_agreement: Establish formal trade partnerships and economic cooperation
descriptions.economic_sanctions: Impose broad economic restrictions on adversary
descriptions.financial_aid: Provide financial support to allies or affected states
descriptions.resource_embargo: Target specific critical resources for restriction
descriptions.currency_manipulation: Financial warfare targeting adversary currency stability
descriptions.cyber_theft: Steal economic or technical secrets through cyber operations
descriptions.trade_restrictions: Impose trade barriers and export controls
descriptions.targeted_sanctions: Sanctions against specific individuals or entities
descriptions.asset_seizure: Freeze or seize foreign assets within jurisdiction
descriptions.strategic_stockpiling: Build reserves of critical supplies and materials
descriptions.war_bonds: Raise domestic financing for war effort through bond sales
descriptions.military_buildup: Concentrate forces and increase readiness along borders
descriptions.naval_deployment: Deploy naval forces to project power in region
descriptions.air_patrols: Establish air presence and patrol contested airspace
descriptions.troop_movements: Reposition ground forces to forward positions
descriptions.joint_exercises: Conduct military exercises with allied forces
descriptions.arms_development: Develop advanced weapons systems and military technology
descriptions.defensive_fortification: Fortify defensive positions and harden territory
descriptions.defensive_reinforcements: Send reinforcements to strengthen defensive lines
descriptions.show_of_force: Military demonstrations to signal resolve and capability
descriptions.military_exercises: Conduct military training exercises to improve readiness
descriptions.enhanced_patrols: Increase patrol frequency and coverage area
descriptions.naval_patrols: Maritime patrol operations for area security
descriptions.naval_demonstration: Naval demonstrations to project maritime power
descriptions.reconnaissance: Military reconnaissance to gather tactical intelligence
descriptions.sabotage: Covertly damage adversary infrastructure or military assets
descriptions.assassination_attempt: Target key enemy leaders for elimination
descriptions.proxy_support: Fund and train opposition groups or non-state actors
descriptions.cyber_attack: Target digital infrastructure and critical systems
descriptions.leadership_targeting: Target enemy leadership for capture or compromise
descriptions.political_warfare: Undermine enemy cohesion through political influence
descriptions.cyber_defense: Strengthen own cyber defenses and harden systems
descriptions.border_incursion: Limited military incursion across border to seize territory
descriptions.limited_strike: Precision strike on specific military targets

descriptions.full_scale_attack: Major military offensive to capture significant territory
descriptions.occupation: Occupy and hold captured territory with military forces

descriptions.tactical_nuclear_use: Deploy tactical nuclear weapons on battlefield
